content: Just as the linguistic sense of reflexion (meaning 'reflection' as a core vocabulary in high school literacy education) teaches human learners to examine their own output against communicative goals to improve writing skill, the LLM Reflexion agent framework can borrow this educational framing to structure graded self-reflection practice for large language models. This frames LLM self-reflection not as a technical trick, but as a guided literacy practice that mirrors how humans learn to refine reasoning through iterative self-examination.
